name: @clusterio/plugin-mock-external
description: Mock workspace plugin that DELIBERATELY requests conflicting react (^17) and webpack (^4) so the singleton test is falsifiable. The root pnpm.overrides (react/webpack -> catalog: ^18/^5) must collapse these to the single workspace copies. With the overrides, only one react and one webpack exist under node_modules/.pnpm; remove an override and a second copy (react@17 / webpack@4) appears. See TESTPLAN.md Part A.
